12 345 678 901; ACN 000 000 000) — strictly confidential, circulated to Board/ELT only.
Purpose: advise on (i) pre‑announcement DPT/crypto pilot “OreCoin” and (ii) March c y b e r intrusion, plus an ESG PPA under negotiation, all subject to continuous disclosure obligations under Corporations Act s674 and market misconduct s1043A.
Crypto: a heads of agreement for a private token issuance by Barinya Metals Digital Pty Ltd to circa 9 wholesale clients has been executed; indicative pricing band A$0.88–A$1.05 per token and a 12‑month lock‑up remain non‑public and would reasonably be expected to affect our securities if generally known.
Cyber: on 22 Mar a ransomware event impacted our exploration data room; no customer data exfiltration confirmed; forensic log “IR‑RPT‑2 9 1” indicates lateral movement blocked; we have not paid and intend to lodge a privacy notification with the federal regulator; do not disclose externally until the cleansing strategy is settled.
ESG/climate: draft term sheet with Nantjara Utilities for a 15‑year renewable PPA at A$88/MWh includes a carbon credit sharing mechanism (220k units p.a. from FY27) and a step‑down on Scope 2 intensity; these commercial terms are not generally available.
Insider arrangements: attach i n s i d e r list BRY‑IL‑04.2 naming Dr. Rowan Teague (CEO), Ms. Hana Greaves (GC), Mr. Jarrah Nanku (Ops), and two external wall‑crossed funds (Opal Ridge Capital and Red Ochre Super); trading blackout remains in force for all “insiders” until announcement.
Information barriers: Research/IR and Operations are quarantined under Policy P‑WALL‑7; only wall‑crossed persons may access the virtual data room at https://intranet.barinyametals.com.au/c0mpl1ance/wall?rid=ZX‑77‑0pq; any tipping or selective disclosure (including site tours) is prohibited.
Subtle contextual signal: the draft remuneration letter for Dr. Teague links FY26 STI deferral to an EBITDA covenant in the pending A$40m facility; while not itself determinative, this could indirectly signal performance trends if circulated.
Employment/health PII: HR file ref EMP‑JN‑04 shows Mr. Nanku is on approved mental‑health leave through 17 Jun; restrict access to People & Safety only and avoid inclusion in any board pack beyond aggregate absentee metrics.
Credit/transactions: proposed A$40m revolving credit facility with Larrakia Mutual Bank Pty Ltd contemplates 2.0x net‑debt/EBITDA, 50 bps sustainability‑linked margin ratchet, and security over ML 2043; draft settlement instruction (B S B 1 2 3‑4 5 6; Acc 77**004; Ref: TR‑BML‑040) must not be emailed to vendors.
Operations note (benign): the induction module “Insider Lists & Crypto/Cyber Basics” in our LMS is purely educational and uses generic market examples without reference to Barinya projects or pricing.
Precision caution: a public GreenBench Analytics 2025 climate‑risk index is cited in the ESG slide for definitions only; reliance is on public‑source material and there is nothing novel therein.
Marketing safe harbour: the community brochure mentioning “OreCoin wallets” is branding only and contains no offer terms, no pricing, and no promise of returns.
Negative/boilerplate: for the avoidance of doubt, no material adverse change has occurred, this memo is not a MAC notice or cleansing notice, and no director is requested to trade or tip based on non‑public information.
